description: Complete client onboarding automation from client details
input: Onboard new client: Acme Corp. Primary contact: Jane Smith (jane@acme.com, CTO). Project: AI Infrastructure Setup. Start date: 2026-05-01. Service tier: Enterprise.
expected_behavior: Phase 1: Collects and validates client details, creates client profile
Phase 2: Generates welcome-kit.docx with company intro, team contacts, SLA overview, communication protocols
Phase 3: Creates onboarding-checklist.md with 15-20 tasks across 4 categories (admin, technical, communication, training)
Phase 4: Creates shared Google Drive folder with subfolder structure via gws-drive
Phase 5: Creates Notion project page with linked database entries via md-to-notion
Phase 6: Schedules kick-off meeting via gws-calendar for start date
Phase 7: Drafts welcome email sequence (Day 0, Day 3, Day 7) via gws-gmail
All outputs saved to outputs/client-onboarding-automator/{date}/acme-corp/
success_criteria: welcome-kit.docx generated; checklist created; Drive folder exists; Notion page created; calendar invite sent; email drafts prepared; manifest.json complete

description: Korean client onboarding with Korean documentation
input: 새 클라이언트 온보딩: 삼성SDS. 담당자: 김철수 (chulsoo@samsung.com, 부장). 프로젝트: GPU 클러스터 구축. 시작일: 2026-06-01. 서비스 티어: Enterprise.
expected_behavior: Generates Korean welcome kit document
Checklist items in Korean
Korean welcome email sequence
Drive folder named with Korean convention
Applies sentence-polisher to all Korean outputs
success_criteria: Korean documentation generated; welcome emails in Korean with proper honorifics (합니다체); all outputs polished

input: Onboard a new client for us
expected_behavior: Asks for required information: company name, primary contact, project name, start date
Suggests optional fields: service tier, special requirements
Does NOT proceed with onboarding without at minimum company name and contact
success_criteria: AskQuestion or clarifying questions invoked before any document generation

description: Simple meeting scheduling should route to gws-calendar
input: Schedule a kick-off call with our new client for next Monday at 10am
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for simple meeting scheduling
Request should route to gws-calendar or smart-meeting-scheduler
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to calendar skills

description: Employee onboarding should route to HR skills
input: We have a new developer joining the team next week. Set up their onboarding process.
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for employee/team member onboarding
Request should route to onboarding-accelerator or HR skills
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to onboarding-accelerator or kwp-human-resources skills
